sessions.title: CHUB Code Reviewer v0.3.0 — Self-Learning Mechanism
sessions.summary: Designed, implemented, and shipped self-learning for CHUB Code Reviewer plugin. LLM Council validated design (3 sessions). Learning agent runs in parallel, persists to shared kb-store branch via GitHub API. Tested on real PRs (AudienceService#14, idx-cdp#22).
outcomes: Self-learning operational — 10 rules exposed, state persisting to kb-store branch
Confidence formula with proper denominator validated by council
next: Run more reviews to pass 5-observation provisional threshold
Test on Java PR for JAVA-rule exposures
Test promote-rule flow when a candidate emerges
